creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191788
proposed patch

- update to 0.7.2,
 - remove '--without-plugin' from CONFIGURE_ARGS, browser plugin was removed long ago and this option does not exist,
 - add options to choose between GTK2 and GTK3 UI,
 - remove PULSEAUDIO_DESC, there's a default description for that,
 - sort USES/USE_* to pet portlint.
